allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin123 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d pragati_mitra -c "\\d users")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin123 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d pragati_mitra -c "\\d user_roles")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin123 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d pragati_mitra -c "SELECT id, name, display_name FROM roles ORDER BY name;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin123 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d pragati_mitra -c "SELECT id, institution_name, code FROM institutions;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin123 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d pragati_mitra -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS user_count FROM users;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin123 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d pragati_mitra -c "\\d institutions")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin123 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d pragati_mitra -c "SELECT institution_id, institution_name, code FROM institutions;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin123 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d pragati_mitra -c "SELECT id, full_name, email, account_status, token_version FROM users;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin123 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d pragati_mitra -c "SELECT u.full_name, u.email, r.name AS role FROM user_roles ur JOIN users u ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.revoked_at IS NULL ORDER BY u.full_name;")
